sentence: 她的作文在比赛中得奖了。
pinyin: Tā de zuòwén zài bǐsài zhōng dé jiǎng le.
english: Her essay won a prize in the competition.

sentence: 这个地区有大型石化工厂。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū yǒu dàxíng shíhuà gōngchǎng.
english: This area has a large petrochemical plant.

sentence: 展览室里摆满了她的画作。
pinyin: Zhǎnlǎn shì lǐ bǎimǎn le tā de huàzuò.
english: The exhibition room was filled with her paintings.

sentence: 孩子昨晚突然高热，我们连夜去看医生。
pinyin: Háizi zuó wǎn tūrán gāorè, wǒmen liányè qù kàn yīshēng.
english: The child suddenly had a high fever last night, so we went to the doctor in the middle of the night.

sentence: 他终于获准进入实验室参观。
pinyin: Tā zhōngyú huòzhǔn jìnrù shíyànshì cānguān.
english: He finally obtained permission to visit the laboratory.
